query:
-- Tue May 19's existing 8 blocks so Monday's plan complements
SELECT b.sortOrder, b.title, b.blockType, b.durationMin, b.startTime,
       s.name AS subject, ct.code AS topicCode, ct.title AS topicTitle
FROM scheduleBlocks b
LEFT JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
LEFT JOIN curriculumTopics ct ON ct.id = b.curriculumTopicId
WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY b.sortOrder;

-- What subjects + recent topic codes have been used recently (last 30 days of plans)
SELECT s.name AS subject, COUNT(*) AS block_count,
       MAX(dp.date) AS most_recent_use
FROM scheduleBlocks b
JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
WHERE dp.date BETWEEN '2026-04-15' AND '2026-05-15'
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY block_count DESC;

-- Open / in-progress assignments from assignmentsLibrary that could anchor Monday blocks
SELECT id, title, subjectSlug, gradeLevel, source, isActive
FROM assignmentsLibrary
WHERE isActive = 1
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Confirm Mon May 18 plan really is missing
SELECT id, date, status, dayType, notes
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date IN ('2026-05-18', '2026-05-19', '2026-05-20', '2026-05-21')
ORDER BY date;

-- Tue May 19's existing 8 blocks so Monday's plan complements
SELECT b.sortOrder, b.title, b.blockType, b.durationMin, b.startTime,
       s.name AS subject, ct.code AS topicCode, ct.title AS topicTitle
FROM scheduleBlocks b
LEFT JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
LEFT JOIN curriculumTopics ct ON ct.id = b.curriculumTopicId
WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY b.sortOrder;

-- What subjects + recent topic codes have been used recently (last 30 days of plans)
SELECT s.name AS subject, COUNT(*) AS block_count,
       MAX(dp.date) AS most_recent_use
FROM scheduleBlocks b
JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = b.planId
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = b.subjectId
WHERE dp.date BETWEEN '2026-04-15' AND '2026-05-15'
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY block_count DESC;

-- Open / in-progress assignments from assignmentsLibrary that could anchor Monday blocks
SELECT id, title, subjectSlug, gradeLevel, source, isActive
FROM assignmentsLibrary
WHERE isActive = 1
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Confirm Mon May 18 plan really is missing
SELECT id, date, status, dayType, notes
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date IN ('2026-05-18', '2026-05-19', '2026-05-20', '2026-05-21')
ORDER BY date;
